name: Biden-Harris 2020
subject: trash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
This is a real email that Donald Trump sent to his supporters: |
---
Peter, we can't believe it.

This is a real email that Donald Trump sent to his supporters: | [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.15_B5_trash_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.15_B5_trash_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
---
There's no other way to say it: this email is trash.

Donald Trump is scared because he knows Kamala Harris is the best choice to join Joe and this team, and defeat him and Mike Pence in the fall. It's that simple.

But Peter, this is what we are up against. Baseless name-calling and sexist attacks. It is the EXACT same thing Trump did in 2016. And quite honestly, we're nervous -- last time it worked.

So if we are going to fight back against these lies, we need to make sure our email and ads program is fully funded. And that's why we are asking for your help today -- we need for Trump to know that this team has Kamala's back.

[Can you chip in $5 today? We'll put it right to work fighting back against Trump's huge negative campaign against Joe and Kamala.](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.15_B5_trash_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.15_B5_trash_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbee/1cd0ac28/164376a64/357e49bd/4279518977/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbee/1cd0ac28/164376a64/357e49bc/4279518977/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbee/1cd0ac28/164376a64/357e49bf/4279518977/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbee/1cd0ac28/164376a64/357e49bb/4279518977/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbee/1cd0ac28/164376a64/357e49be/4279518977/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbee/1cd0ac28/164376a64/357e49ba/4279518977/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Team Stanton
subject: You Have A Choice In November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
We're living in strange times as a nation, and if these recent events have taught us anything, it's what we value as individuals, families, and as a community. The last four years of this Administration combined with hardships like the pandemic have uncovered urgent challenges that need action now. We're less than 90 days away from the election and the moral fiber of the Representatives you send to Washington is the most important issue on the ballot. Congressman Stanton has always proudly stood up for civil rights for all people.

Unfortunately, last election Greg's opponent Dave Giles ran an ugly, transphobic smear campaign by leaving crude fliers (like the one below) on cars in a church parking lot. These depraved stunts by Greg's opponent make it clear which candidate will focus on our problems, stand up for us in Washington, and be a representative for ALL people regardless of their race, religion, or sexual orientation.

**[Let 's remind him that there is no place for bigotry of any kind in this race, and that we will always defend our LGBTQ family from heinous attacks and intimidation. Help us push back immediately>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y8_GJtNak_KBoa6luuMOP-mO2lPnj9mP7qk3rMwcOqY=/WwOVgUXFLd5mIp4YUV7DpLX33Fz5XKDLoy3HwrH0Fsc=?refcode=X_081020_GilesLGBTQ_A)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y8_GJtNak_KBoa6luuMOP-mO2lPnj9mP7qk3rMwcOqY=/VRt90C6WnKdBuvDoDTXZbpoRt0h1OatynLUELwi3QT0=?refcode=X_062320_TrumpinPHX_A&amount=25)

We promise this - Greg will always fight to protect the rights and liberties of every Arizonan in Congress - even though we know that our opponents' attacks are only going to get nastier before November.

**[Will you help us stay resilient by rushing an express contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Y8_GJtNak_KBoa6luuMOP-mO2lPnj9mP7qk3rMwcOqY=/WwOVgUXFLd5mIp4YUV7DpLX33Fz5XKDLoy3HwrH0Fsc=?refcode=X_081020_GilesLGBTQ_A)**

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Saturdays Should Be Game Days
body:
Peter,We wanted to make sure you saw Bill Hagerty's latest editorial in the Knox News Sentinel calling for college football to come back this Fall. You can read a portion of the story below:**Schools -- Especially Colleges -- Should Play Football This Fall**
Bill Hagerty
_[Knoxville News Sentinel](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkjujld-fuutjhhtj-r/)_
August 14, 2020Football is not just a sport. It is about more than what happens in those four quarters on the gridiron. It's more than 22 players on a field, and if you've ever been to game day in Knoxville you know that.Sports are integral to the fabric of our nation. They bring us together, even when it means a friendly rivalry. We must bring back sports -- especially college football -- this fall.All across the country, communities look forward to coming together each week and supporting their favorite teams. College and high school sports have the ability to lift up entire communities. We've seen it with our own eyes, and most of us have been a part of it in some way: as a player, as a parent or as a fan.America needs football and sports now more than ever. We need a return to normalcy. We need a return to our way of life. We need something to bring us together, not continue to be pushed further and further apart. Efforts are underway to determine near-term modifications that will ensure safety for players and fans alike. Let's find the answer that safely gets us back on the field this fall. ...
Beyond the community-building aspects of returning to a normal season, there are economic consequences of a missed season as well. The University of Tennessee released a report detailing the economic impact that the UT football program has on the Knoxville community. In the 2015-2016 football season alone, the team brought in $355.7 million and 2,611 jobs that directly related to the program, with 1,210 jobs coming from secondary effects. As we seek to recover from the economic damage inflicted by COVID-19, our economy will benefit from the boost that college football brings, even modified as it may be to keep players and fans safe....
President Donald Trump said "Play College Football!" Now, to no one's surprise, the liberals are saying, "DON'T Play College Football!" If the radical Democrats had their way, we wouldn't just cancel the football season, we would all be locked in our basements, like Sleepy Joe Biden, until Nov. 3.The liberals' double standard is on full display: they want to cancel football in the fall and are already blaming fans for the spread of COVID-19, but have cheered on massive protests that have led to rioting and looting and have drawn large crowds across the U.S. and the world....
We are Americans -- the most innovative people on earth -- and together, we will get through this pandemic too. But the sooner that our lives can return to a sense of normalcy, the sooner we can recover from the havoc this pandemic has wreaked.Together, we're going to get through the coronavirus pandemic, and we're going to come out of it stronger than ever before. I'm looking forward to college football this fall.**[READ THE S](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkjujld-fuutjhhtj-y/)**[**TORY**](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkjujld-fuutjhhtj-j/) | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkjujld-fuutjhhtj-t/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkjujld-fuutjhhtj-i/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkjujld-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pkjujld-fuutjhhtj-u/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-pkjujld-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-o) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-pkjujld-fuutjhhtj-b/)

name: Bill Stepien, Trump Campaign Manager
subject: We need to pick it up

name: Corky Messner
subject: Defeating Biden & Harris in New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Joe Biden’s VP pick means we need to pick up the pace in the Granite State. Will you help?
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d1423863a3ac38c8/936622cf901995dec3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Last week, Joe Biden just made it official — he picked California Senator Kamala Harris as his running mate. If there was any doubt that Joe is far from a middle-of-the-road Democrat, it’s now been completely removed. Harris is a Left Coast Liberal to the core, championing higher taxes on the middle class, co-sponsoring the Green New Deal, and co-sponsoring Bernie Sanders’ single-payer Medicare for All plan. _Just to name a few of her radical positions._ **The media will be hard at work trying to convince voters that the Biden/Harris ticket is a moderate one, but don’t be fooled**. The news is about to be inundated with appeals for New Hampshire voters to cast their ballots for Biden and Harris. That means we need to work twice as hard to rally conservative voters to get to the polls. In light of Biden’s pick, we are doubling our grassroots efforts to get factual messaging out to voters. For every $5 contributed, we are able to reach NINE new voters and share the truth about Kamala Harris’ ultra-liberal policies. [Chip in $5 NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d1423863a3ac38c8/642a891b06d7171dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Together, we can fight the blue wave threatening to take over New Hampshire. We can fight Biden and Harris from taking over the White House, and we can fight to keep our Senate majority by defeating Jeanne Shaheen this November. [**Please donate $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or what you can now to help our conservative, grassroots efforts in New Hampshire**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d1423863a3ac38c8/3a6fef40c2deeb33c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Thanks for your support,
Corky Messner [Donate NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d1423863a3ac38c8/269ec253ef539895c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d1423863a3ac38c8/c0b1d67916b06111c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/d1423863a3ac38c8/af451e9d143d1cacc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Action @ Team Sri
subject: TAKE ACTION: Save the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend ,

Last week, Donald Trump openly admitted in a live interview his intent is to defund the USPS and make universal vote-by-mail more difficult -- even as a broken mail system threatens small businesses and families alike.

“Trump admits he is undermining USPS to make it harder to vote by mail”
-The Guardian

SAVE THE USPS » https://secure.ngpvan.com/2g6JBJfZXU-h5fXtvOhC9g2

This is a disturbing attack on our democracy as well as a historic dismantling of an essential public utility -- and it must stop now.

We need to ensure that we stand with our postal workers, who risk being laid off. We need to protect our post office to ensure that this public good works for all -- and we need to protect our mail-in-ballots from sabotage by funding the USPS.

We’re taking a stand and demanding that Congress step in to protect our post office -- and we’re urging you to stand with us.

SAVE THE USPS » https://secure.ngpvan.com/2g6JBJfZXU-h5fXtvOhC9g2

Thanks,
Team Sri

Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_pet_2020.08.16_ats_b1_all&amount=25

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.
Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020?refcode=em_pet_2020.08.16_ats_b1_all&amount=25
Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]
If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/264b79dd-dedf-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/572f39c0-e3df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJmMzljMC1lM2RmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quh8PPjGjn3-e6ADHtxGIa7CWBqFJALGFlF1vMGLnDo=&id=117373579 .

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4f/53d9897e/543b9544/1c882f55/330510188/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---
Derek --

We hope this email finds you and your loved ones safe and healthy. Our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark Warner is focused on in the Senate.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now: **
* This week, Mark introduced the bipartisan _GET CARES Act_ with Sen. Tim Scott. This bill [**encourages Americans to safely resume preventative care and treatment**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4f/53d9897e/543b9544/1c882f54/330510188/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-scott-introduce-legislation-to-boost-preventive-healthcare/"). Since the coronavirus pandemic started, routine health care and cancer screenings have fallen by 68 percent nationally. Regular checkups can help with early detection of preventable diseases.

* Last week, on a call with military families, Mark discussed the fact that [**almost one-fifth of active military families in Virginia are food insecure**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4f/53d9897e/543b9544/1c882f53/330510188/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.pilotonline.com/military/vp-nw-military-food-insecurity-20200807-3pdnignynjgsbihiizukdr4qby-story.html"). Mark is committed to removing barriers to accessing healthy and affordable food for our military families, including widening eligibility for military families to receive Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP) benefits.

* The cost of [**4.1 million children 's prescriptions would be reduced**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4f/53d9897e/543b9544/1c882f52/330510188/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-booker-introduce-legislation-to-reduce-prescription-drug-costs-for-low-income-children/") under Mark and Sen. Cory Booker's new bill, the _Fair Drug Prices for Kids Act_. This legislation will lower prescription drug costs for states, making them more affordable for the children who need them.

* [**Mark raised concerns about delayed mail delivery in Virginia**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4f/53d9897e/543b9544/1c882f51/330510188/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://fredericksburg.com/news/local/stafford-residents-fed-up-with-poor-mail-delivery/article_a4da47bc-5280-555c-8c23-b9271560da27.html"). In a letter to Postmaster General Louis DeJoy, Warner urged DeJoy to "rescind any policy changes that are contributing to delays in mail delivery." The U.S. Postal Service (USPS) is a critical service for millions of Americans who rely on the mail for prescriptions, bills, and letters from loved ones. Mark will continue to work to make sure USPS has the funding needed to continue its service.

* [**Mark worked with his colleagues across the aisle**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db4f/53d9897e/543b9544/1c882f50/330510188/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-colleagues-call-for-long-term-relief-for-43m-student-loan-borrowers/") to urge Senate leaders for long-term relief for the millions of Americans who struggle with student loan debt. Under the _CARES Act_ , more than 8 million people were ineligible to receive the six months of interest-free relief on their student loans.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

|

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/7176cc53-4cde-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb/8b26bcc0-f2df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjI2YmNjMC1mMmRmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjURwEfEOTo4f-4lJX4_nOg5XdgdQjEG3qLr7c4-hk=&id=108420485).

| | Team, we think it’s a simple enough idea: _folks working full-time jobs should be able to live off their wages_. However, that’s not the reality of millions of Americans working jobs that pay dramatically less than their cost of living. [**We need to demand that Congress enact a living minimum wage of $15 per hour!!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18712905/237379290/-521045080?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjI2YmNjMC1mMmRmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjURwEfEOTo4f-4lJX4_nOg5XdgdQjEG3qLr7c4-hk=&emci=7176cc53-4cde-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=8b26bcc0-f2df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=6233172) | | | [Tell Congress to enact a living minimum wage →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18712906/237379293/-521045080?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjI2YmNjMC1mMmRmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjURwEfEOTo4f-4lJX4_nOg5XdgdQjEG3qLr7c4-hk=&emci=7176cc53-4cde-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=8b26bcc0-f2df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=6233172)
---

We’ve seen the consequences of low wages as millions of Americans who were living paycheck-to-paycheck face evictions due to the pandemic. These circumstances are extraordinary, but the fact is:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18712909/237379295/-521045080?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjI2YmNjMC1mMmRmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjURwEfEOTo4f-4lJX4_nOg5XdgdQjEG3qLr7c4-hk=&emci=7176cc53-4cde-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=8b26bcc0-f2df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=6233172)

Even two years before this pandemic hit, millions couldn’t afford to build emergency savings. **We could have been more financially prepared if Americans were making living wages, all along.** We need to stand up and demand structural reform to our economy to make it more fair and equitable for all.
[**Friend, can you stand with us and demand that Congress pass a universal living wage of $15 per hour?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18712911/237379297/-521045080?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjI2YmNjMC1mMmRmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjURwEfEOTo4f-4lJX4_nOg5XdgdQjEG3qLr7c4-hk=&emci=7176cc53-4cde-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=8b26bcc0-f2df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=6233172)
| | [Pass a living minimum wage →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18712913/237379300/-521045080?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjI2YmNjMC1mMmRmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjURwEfEOTo4f-4lJX4_nOg5XdgdQjEG3qLr7c4-hk=&emci=7176cc53-4cde-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=8b26bcc0-f2df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=6233172)
---

Thanks for your support,
Team Siegel

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18712915/237379302/-556504486?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjI2YmNjMC1mMmRmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vHjURwEfEOTo4f-4lJX4_nOg5XdgdQjEG3qLr7c4-hk=&emci=7176cc53-4cde-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=8b26bcc0-f2df-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=6233172)

name: Josh Hicks
subject: Our campaign is on TV! Take a look at our first ad of the race
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Without being able to connect with voters in person, TV and digital ads are going to be the best way to get the word out about our campaign. Grassroots, online donors are the backbone of our campaign and thanks to your support our first TV ad just went up yesterday, take a look!

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18712920/237379309/1896069278?refcode=FL_em_fr_20200816TVad1resend_JH_all_xx_xx_atest_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDI2YmNjMC1mMmRmLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bev7yWXYyayZvwHfGgEIP3yeJIX0H20gCtafOynxUzU=)
| | We just don’t have enough members of Congress who know what it’s like to be poor. Not enough folks who know what it’s like to struggle to put food on the table or pay health insurance premiums. **I know because I’ve worked hard and still been poor.** But I think with folks like me in Washington fighting for the people in our district, we can do some good. That’s what our first television ad of the campaign is all about. I’m running to bring real representation back to this district, and bring the voices of regular folks in Kentucky’s 6th District to Congress. [_**You can watch our first TV ad here. | | Friend, Did you see the news? President Trump is coming back to Minnesota on Monday for a stop in Mankato. **We already knew that Minnesota was going to be a top pick up target for Trump, but lumping us in with visits to Wisconsin and Arizona on the same day confirms it.** We need your help: by making a contribution this weekend ahead of the visit, you will aid our ability to respond to Trump and whatever comes in his wake on Monday. name: Mary & the TNDP Team
subject: DemConvention Week Update | TN Delegation Virtual Events
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/tndp%20isaac%20300%20px.png]Dear Peter,

HAPPY #DEMConvention week! We want to make you aware of the TENNESSEE DELEGATION VIRTUAL EVENTS coming up this week. Hope you will join us!

During this unprecedented convention year, all events are virtual, which mean Democrats from across the state and country can join the Tennessee delegation. We've listed the events below. This week you can join us for breakfast every day, celebrate the 19th amendment with us on Tuesday, or buy a "Doodle," a unique piece of by an artist, musician, writer, or activist.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DNC%20BREAKFASTS%20%281%29.png]
DELEGATION BREAKFASTS: Monday, 8/17 - 8/20, 8:30-10:00 AM CT
Join Chair Mary Mancini and the Tennessee Delegation each morning for breakfast featuring nationally known Democratic leaders including Attorney General Eric Holder, Congressman Hakeem Jeffries, Congresswoman Maxine Waters, and Andrew Yang to name just a few. Tickets are $25 per breakfast or all four for $75.
Purchase Tickets! [https://tndp.org/2020-dnc-breakfasts/] | Facebook Event [https://www.facebook.com/events/217274179727923/]

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/ratified-facebook-post.png]
RATIFIED! A 19TH AMENDMENT CELEBRATION - Tuesday, 8/18, 6:00 - 8:00 PM CT
August 18th, the second day of the DNC convention, marks the 100th Anniversary of the ratification of the 19th amendment. Led by the Democratic Party of Tennessee, the state that became the 36th to ratify the amendment on that day 100 years ago, you are invited to join a multi-state celebration of this historic milestone. This two hour event will feature speakers, musical performances, and a roll call of "The Perfect 36," the states that ratified the amendment.
Purchase Tickets! [https://tndp.org/ratified/] | Facebook Event [https://www.facebook.com/events/304840810958080]

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/DOODLES-FOR-DEMOCRATS-tndp-webpage-1.png]
DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION
How can you own a one-of-a-kind piece of art AND help to elect Democrats in Tennessee? DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS! Artists, musicians, activists, writers, and politicians took a high quality heavyweight mixed media 6 x 8 inch artist board, picked up the artistic implement of their choice and doodled away. And the results have been outstanding. Visit the TNDP DOODLES FOR DEMOCRATS AUCTION (Live on Sunday, August 16, 2020 at 8:00 am CT). [https://tndp.org/doodles/]
VISIT THE AUCTION [https://www.betterunite.com/TNDP-tndpdoodlesfordemocrats/Auction?a=39ca3e40-18f5-4601-b47b-f22811e3bf99] | FACEBOOK [https://www.facebook.com/events/589833798588681]
THANK YOU TO TN Delegation DemConvention SPONSORS!

TRUE BLUE
Olan Mills

MARINE BLUE
Blue Cross Blue Shield of Tennessee

CERULEAN BLUE
Branstetter Stranch & Jennings United Auto Workers (Region 8)
Brotherhood of Maintenance of Way Employees Division-International Brotherhood of Teamsters
Mayor Andy Berke
Congressman Steve Cohen
Congressman Jim Cooper
Communications Workers of America Tennessee (CWA-TN)

AQUA BLUE
State Senator Leader Raumesh Akbari
State House Representative Bill Beck
State House Representative Yusuf Hakeem
State House Representative Harold M. Love, Jr.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/sponsors.png]
See you "at" #DemConvention.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/signature2.png]
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR. GEETA MCMILLAN, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.

Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

name: Matt Gaetz Polling
subject: Does the media treat Trump fairly?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-72rc0aWUrl7GOx5TOGRs1uXNuy09FkCSqKu4YlK2HjhZTjzGl4vaCmhLdWdatQkSw7V5MdJAsrF4tpUV59tm5D49afF5o6OTEr95NDDlPvI1-mvJWHjF0tWwgGUukF2nEEScZI_i9lStSbpYdIo7y4VxVEYhz4V2uYxSpoHHd_jDXLqBF0-QzWSh0_vvg0u&c=hhUE3ydT3JTZieJvBUtIdMCdTgBqnoEt4y8dguDje1MlvAoCeToJWw==&ch=J3J93B7e08Hp9QjNJ-v63TxDygcfX2JH1fj17k0-bSJG3XTSecsFUg==)
---
| Peter,
As one of our top supporters, we want to get your opinion on America's mainstream media outlets.
Do you think the mainstream media treats President Trump fairly? Or is there a bias against him and his supporters?
---
| | | [YES - THE MEDIA TREATS TRUMP FAIRLY](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-72rc0aWUrl7GOx5TOGRs1uXNuy09FkCSqKu4YlK2HjhZTjzGl4vaCmhLdWdatQkgIUOChj8fI7FTxPIrRo3X4Z7zQ8s0FKdy697eDYC4wxFLx_NnNdxxLjhNRZBXJ6v2CnFQpoM7xISm4ZrpS2yKWFLOHguyIGNN9eEsynIZCr5mPBRymT7DeEQZf6mLvWV&c=hhUE3ydT3JTZieJvBUtIdMCdTgBqnoEt4y8dguDje1MlvAoCeToJWw==&ch=J3J93B7e08Hp9QjNJ-v63TxDygcfX2JH1fj17k0-bSJG3XTSecsFUg==)
---
| | | [NO - THE MEDIA IS BIASED AGAINST TRUMP](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-72rc0aWUrl7GOx5TOGRs1uXNuy09FkCSqKu4YlK2HjhZTjzGl4vaCmhLdWdatQkgIUOChj8fI7FTxPIrRo3X4Z7zQ8s0FKdy697eDYC4wxFLx_NnNdxxLjhNRZBXJ6v2CnFQpoM7xISm4ZrpS2yKWFLOHguyIGNN9eEsynIZCr5mPBRymT7DeEQZf6mLvWV&c=hhUE3ydT3JTZieJvBUtIdMCdTgBqnoEt4y8dguDje1MlvAoCeToJWw==&ch=J3J93B7e08Hp9QjNJ-v63TxDygcfX2JH1fj17k0-bSJG3XTSecsFUg==)
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-72rc0aWUrl7GOx5TOGRs1uXNuy09FkCSqKu4YlK2HjhZTjzGl4vaCmhLdWdatQkSw7V5MdJAsrF4tpUV59tm5D49afF5o6OTEr95NDDlPvI1-mvJWHjF0tWwgGUukF2nEEScZI_i9lStSbpYdIo7y4VxVEYhz4V2uYxSpoHHd_jDXLqBF0-QzWSh0_vvg0u&c=hhUE3ydT3JTZieJvBUtIdMCdTgBqnoEt4y8dguDje1MlvAoCeToJWw==&ch=J3J93B7e08Hp9QjNJ-v63TxDygcfX2JH1fj17k0-bSJG3XTSecsFUg==)
---
| The 2020 election will be the most critical of our lifetime and will determine the future of our country. We'll have the choice between far-left extremism, expanded government, open borders, and "cancel culture" or a President that will deliver for the Silent Majority in our country.
We want to ensure that the media is treating President Trump with fairness, which is why [we need your response today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-72rc0aWUrl7GOx5TOGRs1uXNuy09FkCSqKu4YlK2HjhZTjzGl4vaCmhLdWdatQkSw7V5MdJAsrF4tpUV59tm5D49afF5o6OTEr95NDDlPvI1-mvJWHjF0tWwgGUukF2nEEScZI_i9lStSbpYdIo7y4VxVEYhz4V2uYxSpoHHd_jDXLqBF0-QzWSh0_vvg0u&c=hhUE3ydT3JTZieJvBUtIdMCdTgBqnoEt4y8dguDje1MlvAoCeToJWw==&ch=J3J93B7e08Hp9QjNJ-v63TxDygcfX2JH1fj17k0-bSJG3XTSecsFUg==)

-Matt Gaetz Polling

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I'd love to have your endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I'm really hoping you can take a moment to add your name before the convention begins. |
---
Peter,

**You've already heard from me this week, but let me say this again:** I'm _beyond_ excited to join my friend Joe, and this team, as his running mate.

I'm ready to get to work, win this election, rebuild our country, and serve you, the people.

Tomorrow, we're kicking off our party's national convention and will show Donald Trump, Mike Pence, and the whole country the magnitude of the momentum behind our campaign.

That's why the team emailed you on Friday to ask you to add your name and officially endorse our ticket.

**But Peter, I didn't see your name on our list of grassroots endorsers and I'm really hoping you can take a moment to add your name before the convention begins.**[Can you add your endorsement now?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e573f/674563974/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__ns") | [YES, I'LL ENDORSE THE TICKET >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e573f/674563974/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
---
I'm thankful to be on this journey with you, Peter. Let's win this thing!

Your partner in the fight,

Kamala Harris

**P.S.** Endorsing our ticket is a great way to show that you believe in leaders who follow medical guidance, listen to the scientists, and yes, wear masks! [Click here to add your endorsement now »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e573f/674563974/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e573f/674563974/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/pet-endorse-the-ticket?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__ns&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.16_B1_kdh-endorse_X__F1_S1_C1__ns")
---
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e573e/674563974/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e573d/674563974/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e573c/674563974/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e573b/674563974/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e573a/674563974/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e5739/674563974/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e5738/674563974/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e5737/674563974/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e5736/674563974/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e5735/674563974/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e5738/674563974/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e5734/674563974/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e5737/674563974/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbec/1cd0ac28/165813474/357e5733/674563974/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Seriously?!?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The Senate went on recess |
---
Hi friend,

Millions of Americans have gotten sick, lost their jobs, or face eviction, foreclosure, or bankruptcy as a result of the uncontrolled, uncontained COVID-19 pandemic.

_More than 160,00 Americans have lost their lives._

This is the worst public health crisis in a century.

**Nevertheless, Mitch McConnell has sent the Senate home for summer holidays. They are on recess until September 8! My opponent, David Perdue, is free to lounge on his private island while COVID-19 spreads among the people unabated.** [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2604/5b2c1286/3f1d9a7d/25f19b66/3508878131/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_16_recess?refcode=em_2020_08_16_recess") _Friend, I guess I'm not surprised._

The response to the pandemic from the Republicans leading our government has been a **_catastrophic failure_**.

**[Friend, electing new political leadership in November is literally a matter of life and death. Today, will you chip in $20 to my campaign to win in Georgia and take control of the Senate?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2604/5b2c1286/3f1d9a7d/25f19b69/3508878131/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_16_recess?refcode=em_2020_08_16_recess&amount=20")**

| | [Chip in $20 right now >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2604/5b2c1286/3f1d9a7d/25f19b69/3508878131/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_16_recess?refcode=em_2020_08_16_recess&amount=20")
---
Friend, it's not just Donald Trump.

Instead of confronting this emergency with the honesty and seriousness necessary to protect American lives, David Perdue has mindlessly parroted the President's endless denials and misinformation -- all while lining his own pockets.

Other countries have largely contained the virus. While Senator Perdue and the GOP told us not to worry about it, they let it spread like wildfire and kill Americans at a massive scale.

**The U.S. House of Representatives passed a coronavirus relief bill THREE MONTHS AGO (!!!), but McConnell, Perdue, and the rest of the Republicans in the Senate refused to put it up for a vote or negotiate in good faith.**

**Now, David Perdue and his Senate colleagues are going home instead of passing a bill to protect the lives and livelihoods of the American people they are sworn to serve.**

_They just gave up._

Georgians deserve better.

America deserves better.

**We simply can't afford another six years of David Perdue and Mitch McConnell in power.**

**[Please, pitch in $20 or any amount to send me to the U.S Senate, where I will do my job, fight for the people of my state, and NEVER simply give up and go home.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2604/5b2c1286/3f1d9a7d/25f19b69/3508878131/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_16_recess?refcode=em_2020_08_16_recess&amount=20")**

_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Friend,

Sorry to bother you on a Sunday -- I just wanted to give you a quick update on where we stand with our mid-month fundraising goal. As of right now we’re $2,564 short of where we need to be. If you’re able, will you consider pitching in now to help us close the gap?

name: Team Hart
subject: With a little hard work from everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotgXD1ax15VxiikrFTtjYY-cOd4yn_JDWC4hLRo0hY=/i4tjeyytFWZJfSGk1dwERQo_35fMT22RItme7jGssmo=) The derecho storms that formed over Iowa last week devastated our communities and farmlands. It's going to take an incredible amount of work, across local and state levels, to restore our communities to what they were just a week ago. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotgXD1ax15VxiikrFTtjYY-cOd4yn_JDWC4hLRo0hY=/i4tjeyytFWZJfSGk1dwERQo_35fMT22RItme7jGssmo=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotgXD1ax15VxiikrFTtjYY-cOd4yn_JDWC4hLRo0hY=/i4tjeyytFWZJfSGk1dwERQo_35fMT22RItme7jGssmo=) From shattered windows to crushed silos, all accompanied by mass power outages, we know the only way we will pull through this is by sticking together. Many people have reached out asking how they can help. We have put together a list of organizations across eastern Iowa helping people get through this difficult time. Quad Cities Community Foundation: **[https://qccf.fcsuite.com/erp/donate](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotgXD1ax15VxiikrFTtjYY-cOd4yn_JDWC4hLRo0hY=/r5HxOQjbPw_78epVnS7vO1YnPQcTC_O49LI2AhVyULA=)** United Way of Johnson and Washington County: **[https://www.unitedwayjwc.org/](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotgXD1ax15VxiikrFTtjYY-cOd4yn_JDWC4hLRo0hY=/TuOizczeKk5lN6wTNBrvN-jz7UEM5Fu5CPP9O1NW15w=)** United Way of Clinton County: **[https://www.clintonunitedway.org/civicrm/contribute/transact?reset=1&id=2](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotgXD1ax15VxiikrFTtjYY-cOd4yn_JDWC4hLRo0hY=/Lcjv0elnI6PUjR4beAGfAHOlXGeb5pZcxNEqLE--5_Y=?reset=1&id=2 )** United Way of Jasper County: **[https://secure.qgiv.com/for/uwojccd/mobile](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotgXD1ax15VxiikrFTtjYY-cOd4yn_JDWC4hLRo0hY=/R6GUCoU7TbeSjBfBqreDRCAx9p9O_QkqyJCmnFlD9Cg=)** We will get through this together. It will take time, but we can do it with cooperation between neighbors and appreciation for our trained professionals that are restoring our communities. We will come out of this stronger, Team Hart | Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---

name: Amy Kennedy
subject: We must save the United States Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amy Kennedy for Congress
body:
|
#
Hello, Less than 100 days until the election, the Trump Administration is trying to dismantle the United States Postal Service to win re-election. They’re slashing delivery hours for postal workers and removing mailboxes across the country. And even Donald Trump himself said he will not provide emergency funding for the United States Postal Service because without it, we “can’t have universal mail-in voting.” **[This is outrageous and we have to fight back. Add your name to our petition calling on Congress to pass emergency funding for the USPS right now>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18714639/237449467/718765028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTY1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODg4NjAxOS0wZmUwLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UFl3pKBV_0O1J7yjmgsCxkwhxHrGWTrytlWQSYyJd88=&emci=02694ca2-0ae0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=98886019-0fe0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=19577462)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18714640/237449468/718765028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTY1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODg4NjAxOS0wZmUwLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UFl3pKBV_0O1J7yjmgsCxkwhxHrGWTrytlWQSYyJd88=&emci=02694ca2-0ae0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=98886019-0fe0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=19577462)
---
Mail carriers deliver news, ballots, and essential goods like medicine to millions of people every single day.
But with the pandemic threatening to upend our elections, we need a working postal service to ensure people across the country can safely exercise their right to vote by mail this year.
Pushing the USPS to fail would threaten our elections, risk the health and safety of people in New Jersey and across the country -- and put millions of people out of work in the middle of a pandemic.
**[We can’t play politics with this essential service. Add your name now to join me in calling for emergency funding for the USPS>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18714641/237449469/718765028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTY1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODg4NjAxOS0wZmUwLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UFl3pKBV_0O1J7yjmgsCxkwhxHrGWTrytlWQSYyJd88=&emci=02694ca2-0ae0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=98886019-0fe0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=19577462) **
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18714642/237449470/718765028?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTY1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODg4NjAxOS0wZmUwLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UFl3pKBV_0O1J7yjmgsCxkwhxHrGWTrytlWQSYyJd88=&emci=02694ca2-0ae0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=98886019-0fe0-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=19577462)
---
Thank you for raising your voice on this today.
— Amy Kennedy

subject: The secret to getting David Perdue’s attention: 💰💰

body:
We know who Perdue really works for |
---
Friend,

Jon Ossoff's crooked GOP opponent David Perdue makes the time to meet with corporate donors -- but not his constituents.

**Last week, Perdue met privately with two special interest groups who have given him $10,000 each since 2014.**

**The message Perdue is sending is clear: If you want his time and attention, you've got to pay for it.**

Whether it's trading stocks to line his own pockets or meeting with special interest groups during a public health and economic crisis, **Perdue has gone against the interests of his own constituents**.

Jon Ossoff's campaign is fueled by grassroots supporters like you -- not corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. He will be accountable to all Georgians.

**[Right now, chip in to help Jon defeat Perdue and root out this blatant corruption!](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2628/5b2c1286/3f069844/25f19abe/2861352230/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_14_crpt?refcode=em_2020_08_16_crpt")**

In the last six years, Perdue has held no public town halls for his constituents. Now, he won't accept Jon's request for five public debates before Election Day.

**But Perdue always seems to find the time for his wealthy donors.**

**Unlike David Perdue, Jon Ossoff will put his constituents first.**

Since the start of his campaign. Jon has held and attended over 100 free, public events, both virtually and in person, where he's taken questions from Georgians.

It's time Georgia has a leader who will listen to the concerns of his constituents and put the people first.

name: Biden-Harris 2020
subject: Peter, Joe and Kamala need you now more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
There's never been a more important time to give (and I'll explain why in a second). |
---
Peter,

I'm reaching out tonight to ask you to chip in for the first time to make Joe Biden and Kamala Harris the next President and Vice President of the United States.

There's never been a more important time to give (and I'll explain why in a second), so we're sending everyone who steps up our brand-new Biden-Harris sticker as our way of saying thanks. | | | [Joe and Kamala need you now more than ever -- chip in $5 to join more than 3 million grassroots donors standing with them, and we'll send you this sticker.](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_bidenharrissticker?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.16_B4_conventionlastchance_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.16_B4_conventionlastchance_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")

**Senator Harris said it best this week:** "We need more than a victory on November 3rd -- we need a mandate that proves that the past few years do not represent who we are, or who we aspire to be."

Over the next four days of our convention, we're going to see Democrats from across the country coming together to show the world that we stand united in this fight and fire us up for the long journey ahead.

And for us to make this convention as successful as possible, we need to go into day one with our campaign's resources fully charged -- **that 's why I'm reaching out to ask you to make your first donation today.**

[We've got to work our hearts out to make sure that we win together this November, and Peter, we need your help to get the job done. Will you chip in your first $5 right now to show you stand with Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in this fight?](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_bidenharrissticker?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.16_B4_conventionlastchance_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.16_B4_conventionlastchance_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")

[Peter, chip in $5](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_bidenharrissticker?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.16_B4_conventionlastchance_X__F1_S1_C1__nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.16_B4_conventionlastchance_X__F1_S1_C1__nd")
---
Chip in now, and we'll be sure to put your Biden-Harris sticker in the mail. Thanks for being one of our best supporters, Peter.

Elana Firsht
Online Fundraising Director
Biden for President

---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54f2/3942611138/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54ef/3942611138/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54ed/3942611138/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54eb/3942611138/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54e9/3942611138/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54e6/3942611138/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54ed/3942611138/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54e4/3942611138/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54eb/3942611138/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bbfc/1cd0ac28/165ff692a/357e54e2/3942611138/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Week in Review on the Trail 🇺🇸
body:
| | | [View In Your Browser](https://us7.campaign-archive.com/?e=f1831b4ca2&u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c0dfa1177a) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=c0dfa1177a&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend,

Team Mace has been hard at work this week, bringing our #LowcountryFirst message to people across South Carolina's First Congressional District. We had a busy week, including visiting with Lowcountry business leaders, John Keener. He is the owner of The Crab House, and we went there to talk about our plan to help our Lowcountry small businesses during COVID-19. No team will work harder than Team Mace!

See below for a recap of Team Mace's week on the campaign trail.

Thank you so much for your support! We will win BIG in November with your help.
---
|
---
|
---
| [LETTER TO THE EDITOR: Doc from Folly Beach Supports School Choice](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b57bee7440&e=f1831b4ca2)
In the _Post and Courier_ this week, Doc, an educator living on Folly Beach writes: it is parents who best know how their children should be educated. [Read his letter here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=1dac859c57&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [N](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=66592e3b21&e=f1831b4ca2)[ANCY MACE ON THE KELLY GOLDEN SHOW](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=e947c728df&e=f1831b4ca2)
On Monday morning, Nancy was on Kelly Golden's show talking about our Lowcountry kids and plans to go back to school. The message is clear: putting the [#LowcountryFirst](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=eef52cfe38&e=f1831b4ca2) means giving parents the right to decide how their kids are educated in the fall. [Listen here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=ab5ed12d0b&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [JOE BIDEN PICKS FAILED PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE SEN. HARRIS AS VP PICK](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=9498f923c5&e=f1831b4ca2)
"By bringing Sen. Harris into the fold — Joe Biden is affirming what we’ve all already known: now more than ever, Congress needs people who will stand up for their constituents and their district first. Washington needs new, fresh and bold leadership, and the Lowcountry needs someone who will stand with and for them, not with Biden and Harris." [Read Nancy's full statement here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=f0edbdf52d&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [THE CRAB HOUSE WOULD BENEFIT FROM NANCY MACE'S PLAN TO HELP SMALL BUSINESSES DURING COVID-19](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=8f61598e51&e=f1831b4ca2)
The Charleston Crab House hosted Nancy for a business tour on Friday. Owner John Keener and Nancy spoke about the impact COVID-19 has had on his business and the role of government during these uncertain times. Lowcountry businesses, like The Crab House, would benefit from tax relief NOW. Congress must act immediately by modifying the IRS rules and allowing small businesses to deduct COVID-related losses when they are felt. That time is now. [Read Nancy’s tax proposal here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=1f37b7d407&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| [THE ISLAND EYE NEWS: NANCY IS A NO ON OFFSHORE DRILLING](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=789a6ff489&e=f1831b4ca2)
“Mace said she would like to see offshore drilling and exploration forbidden along the East Coast, but she pointed out that such a federal mandate is impossible. She said the reason no one from the South Carolina congressional delegation voted in favor of Cunningham’s legislation is it was a “gimmick” with no chance of success.
“The only way you are going to get Republicans on board with banning drilling along the coast of the Atlantic at this juncture is to ensure that states have a say. I know how to get work done in a bipartisan way because I’ve been doing it as a state lawmaker. I’m not the kind of person who files a bill because it looks good on paper; I actually get something done,” she said, citing a prison reform bill she sponsored in Columbia...”
Nancy is opposed -- and has ALWAYS been opposed -- to offshore drilling. [Read the rest of the feature here.](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=2a6f90f041&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
|
---
Nancy listening to John Keener, owner of The Crab House, explain how her plan to help small businesses during COVID-19 would benefit his businesses.
|
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=22ffaa5f6c&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| **[WEBSITE](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=643f9f37ef&e=f1831b4ca2) | [FACEBOOK](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=1291b80892&e=f1831b4ca2) | [TWITTER](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=a3f9552911&e=f1831b4ca2) | **[**DONATE**](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=2dcb7ef55d&e=f1831b4ca2)

Wade into the Constitution to ensure that no one will ever see her right to choose under threat again in the United States. Too many people in our country lack access to critical and affordable health services. Planned Parenthood Action Fund is backing Mondaire because he unequivocally supports their mission to defend affordable, quality health care for anyone who needs it, not just for the wealthy. | | Sorry to interrupt your weekend, but I want to connect before the deadline. Tonight is the final mid-quarter deadline of the entire election. Honestly, there aren't many deadlines left before Election Day. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: First Day of School, Dr. Fauci, and Contact Tracing
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the new announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Rtihu5uM5RxQzm6uMrqTMsCz3lgXTVonjOjQRAAE7PJRpyagMtfV7JkHu8TRgdslllAMdVEo-OMmmP17Lcvt-K8dEpW9PejMqIuXm1K7BMWAG_4ZwXRwBNmm_XEganYTGZVRkanvk-wmgXbPVkv4ES9x8pgf0oWeRePaPkLsTC_kFVIb0JgG8XTYdMelgWsEOzA9T9xtg5PG_YqyGPaPJCllKaZ5C0YTVvWe5vouDL-eez-3xUOeHd-VQZRD_F3tj8fYtwHTvhYU72v5gUZIhTJi-8kfouxx4HzxjkvOl1akcxUl4zTAPyhuwXDR0gnV3Zsun1qc9Lc=&c=78tbdphimQ7HJ-e9t06t18x16NgKzLQGIUS8_vMVBwrT6h77J6ZhVg==&ch=-fTG0XfLZI6TFm6G43OZA8eekGimM1P7jBzXAmouzNWMw-Knxl9D6A==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
SCHOOLS

For the past few weeks, Education Commissioner Angelica Infante-Green and I have been hearing from districts that they need a little more time to operationalize their safety plans. To give them the time they need to get things right, we have decided that we will delay the start of the school year until September 14th.

As we approach the start of the school year, I know that parents, teachers, students and administrators are feeling uncertainty and anxiety about what the next few months hold. I understand that. But I want you to know that we are going to take the same approach to reopening schools that we have to every other obstacle we've faced during this crisis. We're going to follow the science and the data and if we're not confident that we are ready to safely reopen schools, we won't.
| | |
---|---
|
DR. FAUCI
I was joined by one of the most reliable and trusted public health leaders in the world, [Dr. Anthony S. Fauci](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Rtihu5uM5RxQzm6uMrqTMsCz3lgXTVonjOjQRAAE7PJRpyagMtfV7JkHu8TRgdslIFkyfnwunbK6ju1hU6hjPBapSTOmsmaYQ87WVmPNjsjbNfDVg3IgYX1XO5Oo2ozN0p1FhljA6Ji4yV4h2YfEf2-hHh-1ds5b_1A9BJP9zi2oMM4VF2XGdcQnRq3Yi1MUcYGjtd9nix-CJ9DOyMCZHtGJDAj7qy6o&c=78tbdphimQ7HJ-e9t06t18x16NgKzLQGIUS8_vMVBwrT6h77J6ZhVg==&ch=-fTG0XfLZI6TFm6G43OZA8eekGimM1P7jBzXAmouzNWMw-Knxl9D6A==), to discuss the health benefits of in-person learning and the precautions that need to be in place for us to be confident in the safety of our schools. I'm incredibly grateful to have had the opportunity to ask Dr. Fauci what he thinks about our decision to push back school reopening, where we need to be on testing, and if we're in a safe position to consider in-person learning. I also asked him some of the more than 500 questions that Rhode Islanders emailed me last weekend.

Next Thursday, for our weekly Facebook Live forum, I'll be joined by Jennifer W. Jencks, PhD, LICSW, Director of the Access Center at Bradley Hospital and Assistant Director of Lifespan Pediatric Behavioral Health Emergency Services. I'll also be joined by Barbara Austin, LICSW, Bradley Access Center Supervisor. Our conversation will focus on how we can support students' mental health and well-being as they return to school this fall. If you have a question you'd like me to ask during the Zoom, please respond to this email with it.
| | |
---|---
|
CONTACT TRACING

I want to revisit the three major rules of contact tracing:

Keep your contact tracing journal. Take one minute every day to write down the names of everyone you saw that day.

Make sure you write down the names and phone numbers of everyone you have over. If someone tests positive and says they were at your house, the contact tracers' first call will be to you, and they'll need to know the names and numbers of everyone who was there.

If you get called by the contact tracers, please answer the phone and provide your information. I know people may be hesitant to provide information over the phone, but I want to assure you that the no personally identifiable information is stored in the system, and all the information you provide is protected by the strictest privacy standards under HIPAA.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Rtihu5uM5RxQzm6uMrqTMsCz3lgXTVonjOjQRAAE7PJRpyagMtfV7JkHu8TRgdslllAMdVEo-OMmmP17Lcvt-K8dEpW9PejMqIuXm1K7BMWAG_4ZwXRwBNmm_XEganYTGZVRkanvk-wmgXbPVkv4ES9x8pgf0oWeRePaPkLsTC_kFVIb0JgG8XTYdMelgWsEOzA9T9xtg5PG_YqyGPaPJCllKaZ5C0YTVvWe5vouDL-eez-3xUOeHd-VQZRD_F3tj8fYtwHTvhYU72v5gUZIhTJi-8kfouxx4HzxjkvOl1akcxUl4zTAPyhuwXDR0gnV3Zsun1qc9Lc=&c=78tbdphimQ7HJ-e9t06t18x16NgKzLQGIUS8_vMVBwrT6h77J6ZhVg==&ch=-fTG0XfLZI6TFm6G43OZA8eekGimM1P7jBzXAmouzNWMw-Knxl9D6A==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

body:
#
Peter,
We're running out of time to meet our mid-August goal, so I wanted to reach out with a request:
**[I'm personally asking, Peter: can you chip in $5 to my campaign now?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-august-2020?refcode=em200815i_933&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
It's all on the line in this election. We need to defeat President Trump, keep the Democratic majority in the House, and end Mitch McConnell's era of failed leadership in the Senate.
I'm doing everything I can to defend this Democratic seat in Illinois and flip the Senate in 2020. But I can't do this without the grassroots support of this team. We have to win this fight together.
**[Can I count on your support? Make a $5 contribution before the mid-month deadline.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-august-2020?refcode=em200815i_933&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b41c/1cd0ac28/165100efc/357e52e1/458103333/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b41c/1cd0ac28/165100efc/357e52e0/458103333/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b41c/1cd0ac28/165100efc/357e52df/458103333/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b41c/1cd0ac28/165100efc/357e52e0/458103333/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

subject: A few hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e2f/7f51f7bc/43090380/4ef7e042/1927138353/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Hey Peter,

Taylor tells me that we're almost to our mid-month goal for August, but we still need a little help before midnight. With the race tightening and everything showing that we're closing the gap with Sen. Cornyn, we can't afford to let up now.

**[Please, pitch in whatever you can to help us reach our goal and defeat Sen. Cornyn!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e2f/7f51f7bc/43090380/4ef7e041/1927138353/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augmm?refcode=email_20200816.3nd_1915__&amount=10")**

I'm counting on you, and all of Texas is too.

\-- MJ

| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e2f/7f51f7bc/43090380/4ef7e040/1927138353/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-augmm?refcode=email_20200816.3nd__1915__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e2f/7f51f7bc/43090380/4ef7e047/1927138353/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE5MTUifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1915&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e2f/7f51f7bc/43090380/4ef7e046/1927138353/VEsD/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
